DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT ALLIANCE ROOFING COMPANY, INC. DIMISSES THE FOLLOWING CAUSES OF ACTION IN FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WITH PREJUDICE: - FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT-THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT-FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT-FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF CONTRACT-SEVENTH CAUSE ACTION BREACH OF CONTRACT-EIGHT CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD-NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD-TENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD-ELEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR LIBEL-TWELFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SLANDER -THIRTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR TORTUOUS INTERFERENCE-FOURTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INTERFEREENCE WITH PROSPECTIVE ECONOMIC RELATIONS-FIFTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT INTERFERENCE WITH PROSPECTIVE ECONOMIC RELATIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 60715931)

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT ALLIANCE ROOFING COMPANY, INC. DIMISSES THE FLOLOWING CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHOUT PREJUDICE: -SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT - SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT - SIXTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION ACCOUNTING AND DECLARATORY RELIEF. (TRANSACTION ID # 60715931)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-12-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT; SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT; SIXTEENTH CAUSE OFACTION FOR ACOUNTING AND DECLARATORY RELIEF(TRANSACTION ID # 60774853)

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AS TO FIRST, THIRD, FOURTH,FIFTH AND SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT; EIGHTH, NINTH AND TENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD; ELEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR LIBEL; TWELFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SLANDER; THIRTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR TORTUOUS INTERFERENCE; FOURTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INTERFERENCE WITH PROSPECTIVE ECONOMIC RELATIONS; FIFTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT INTERFERENCE WITH PROSPECTIVE ECONOMIC RELATIONS(TRANSACTION ID # 60774853)
